title: A Buyer Just Asked for 5×7 — Here's How to Fix It in 8 Seconds
description: A buyer messages asking for a size you didn't list. Don't lose the sale. SnapToSize Quick Export: upload your artwork, select 5×7 (5:7 ratio), download. 300 DPI, correctly named, Etsy-ready. One missing size — fixed before the buyer refreshes. No full pack needed.
